entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: Parasitoid wasp used for the biological control of the millet head miner

entities.name: HELIOCHEILUS ALBIPUNCTELLA
entities.description: Millet head miner, a major insect pest of pearl millet in the Sahel

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Agricultural crop targeted by the millet head miner

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: Geographic region where the study is conducted and the pest is prevalent

entities.name: AUGMENTATIVE BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: Strategy involving the release of parasitoids to manage pest populations

entities.name: PARASITOID REARING PROCESS
entities.description: A standardized small-scale technique for producing Habrobracon hebetor adjusted to Sahel conditions

entities.name: 30% HONEY SOLUTION
entities.description: A nutritional supplement used to increase the progeny of parasitoids during rearing

entities.name: CORCYRA CEPHALONICA
entities.description: Host insect used in the rearing process of Habrobracon hebetor

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL REARING METHOD
entities.description: A previous rearing technique involving 2 females supplied once with 25 C. cephalonica larvae

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Storage condition ranging from 23–32°C for parasitoid females

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: Storage condition ranging from 25%–80% for parasitoid females

entities.name: DIAPAUSE
entities.description: A period of suspended development in Heliocheilus albipunctella during the off-season
